narrative:
Trotwood-Madison City Sd city school district has 13,207 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 40.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 35.5 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +8.4% D−R vs +49.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
